productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Style Note  We like Indian apparel from biba. Bright and colourful with traditional details and easy to pair, their kurtas are favourites for those who like an ethnic look. Product Details  Multi-coloured printed kurta, has a V neckline, gathers below the neckline, short sleeves with slightly elasticated cuffs, two welt pockets in front below the waist, side slits and a slit at the back through the centre and curved hemlines    Material and Care  100% cotton  Wash separately in cold water  Do not bleach  Dry in shade  Use medium to hot iron Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 32 Style Note We like Indian apparel from BIBA.
